discovery.text: Yaletown's premier design hotel. Bold, colorful contemporary rooms. Excellent on-site Italian restaurant/bar. Steps from Yaletown's galleries, restaurants, and seawall. Rating 4.7/5 (1,129 reviews) — highest-rated boutique in Vancouver. May push above $200 budget but worth checking rates. Condé Nast Traveler featured. The design-forward splurge option.
